chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 583 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 22.09.2023 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Kamran Pathan, Advocate for applicant along with applicant. Complainant is present in person. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – There is a dispute between the parties, who are co-villagers. On the day of incident viz. 26.06.2023, applicant along with five other accused duly named in FIR, barged into house of complainant duly armed with iron rods and hatchets. Applicant was armed with a hatchet and he caused injury to complainant so also other accused, and his daughter Asma. Then, on intervention of witnesses, they left the house; hence FIR. 2. Learned Counsel for the applicant has chosen to remain absent. I have heard the applicant in person and the Counsel holding brief on behalf of his Advocate. 3. Learned DPG submits that complainant had received six injuries and all are bailable except 337-F(v) PPC, which is punishable for 05 years, and it is not mentioned in the FIR that as to who had caused that injury to the complainant. Mst. Asma had also received an injury: 337-F(v) PPC at the hand of applicant, but there is a delay of more than one month in registration of FIR viz. on 01.08.2023; hence, he has no objection. Cr. Bail App. No. S – 583 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 4. The dispute between the parties is admitted in FIR and there is a delay of more than one month in its registration; therefore, false implication of the applicant cannot be ruled out.

S – 583 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 4. The dispute between the parties is admitted in FIR and there is a delay of more than one month in its registration; therefore, false implication of the applicant cannot be ruled out. Hence, this application is allowed. Accordingly, ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to applicant, vide order dated 28.08.2023, is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 5. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
